settings.tip_carat: Carat weight in diamonds always refers to its actual weight on a scale, not its size. Today we have precise scales for accurately weight.
settings.tip_color: Color is graded on a D–Z scale. D is completely colorless and most valuable. The less color present, the more brilliance and fire it can display.
settings.tip_clarity: While most diamonds have natural inclusions, the fewer blemishes, the rarer the stone. Diamonds with higher clarity reflect light better.
settings.tip_cut: Your diamond's cut refers to the quality of its polish. An Excellent cut maximizes brilliance, fire, and scintillation.
settings.ks_width_desc: Measured at the base of the ring
settings.ks_tcw_desc: The setting's average total carat weight
settings.ks_metal_desc: The secret sauce that makes this piece.
settings.ks_profile_desc: Only stacks with a chevron/curved band

settings.heading: Make It Yours, Without the Extra Fees
settings.text:
At Solarii, customization shouldn't cost a fortune. We’ve waived all labor fees—you only pay for premium materials.

✨ What’s FREE (On the House):

  • Custom Sizing: Any size, including 1/4 sizes.
  • Personalization: Free engraving (Name, Date, or Message).
  • Design Tweaks: Adjust stone size or styling.
  • Gold Tone: Choose Yellow, Rose, or White Gold plating at no extra cost.

💎 Premium Upgrades (At Material Cost):

  • Solid Gold: Upgrade to 10K, 14K, 18K, or 24K Gold.
  • Stone Upgrade: Switch to premium Moissanite.

👉 Ready to start? Email us at service@solariijewelry.com.

settings.title: Does moissanite fade or change color?
settings.text: No, moissanite does not fade. In rare cases, it may show slight hints of yellow or green tones, but we carefully select high-quality stones to avoid any noticeable color changes over time.

settings.title: Is moissanite suitable for everyday wear?
settings.text: Yes, moissanite is highly durable and suitable for everyday wear. With a hardness of 9.25 on the Mohs scale, it is highly resistant to scratches and can withstand daily wear and tear.

settings.title: Can moissanite be used for engagement rings?
settings.text: Absolutely. Moissanite is a popular choice for engagement rings due to its brilliance and durability, especially for those seeking a budget-friendly alternative. Its hardness of 9.25 makes it nearly as durable as a diamond, which has a hardness of 10.

settings.title: Will moissanite test as a diamond?
settings.text: Moissanite can be detected as a diamond by standard diamond testers. However, more advanced equipment can easily distinguish between moissanite and diamonds.

settings.title: Is moissanite hypoallergenic?
settings.text: Yes, moissanite is typically set in hypoallergenic metals like 925 sterling silver or other non-reactive metals, making it suitable for most people, even those with sensitive skin.

settings.title: Have more questions?
settings.text: We’ve highlighted the 5 most common questions here, but if you have more, feel free to check out our fullFAQsection for additional details.
